title: geum resinosum
intro: Geum resinosum, also known as resinous avens, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the rose family and is native to the mountainous regions of China and the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its resinous sap. The health benefits of Geum resinosum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, as well as being used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
